---
title: "BBRResult"
generated: true
description: "Output of [`bbr_register`](../nitrix-register/bbr_register.qmd)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._bbr`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BBRResult -->
```python
class BBRResult(NamedTuple)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:BBRResult -->
Output of [`bbr_register`](../nitrix-register/bbr_register.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
